text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 9 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
Yearning for your love
Yearning for your love

Every time I see your eyes they draw me in
I can feel you getting underneath my skin
When you're not around my hours feel like days
I can't wait to get you to take my breath away

Cos I'm yearning for your love
All of the time
Yeah, I'm yearning for your love
All of the time
I want your love!!
